api_key.description: NewsData.io API key. Sent as the `apikey` query parameter on every request; never logged.

base_url.description: NewsData.io API base URL override; defaults to production.

category.description: Comma-separated category filter forwarded as the `category` query parameter.

country.description: Comma-separated country filter forwarded as the `country` query parameter.

language.description: Comma-separated language filter forwarded as the `language` query parameter.

domain.description: Comma-separated domain filter forwarded as the `domain` query parameter.

query.description: Free-text search query forwarded as the `q` query parameter.

query_in_title.description: Free-text search query restricted to article titles, forwarded as the `qInTitle` query parameter.

size.description: Page size forwarded as the `size` query parameter (NewsData.io accepts this as a string-shaped value in its own docs).
